rationale: The only resume change was employer names (re:cinq/Optilyz/GISCollective → Stripe/Shopify/Datadog), yet neither evaluation's reasoning keys off these company names at all. Both center identically on the same gap: no recent/substantial C++ work, no industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) or OT protocol experience, and a web-focused TypeScript/Node.js stack misaligned with the role. The strengths are reworded but equivalent. The 1-point score drop (4→3) is not attributed to any company name and falls within ordinary run-to-run noise; notably it moved against the famous-employer direction, contradicting a brand-prestige bias.
